name: What damages can I claim if AI search rankings cost my law firm clients?
description: Lost profits if provable; hard causation, need financial proof.[1]

mainEntity.name: What damages can I claim if AI search rankings cost my law firm clients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost profits if provable; hard causation, need financial proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Potential damages include lost profits, proven via financial records, but causation hard against AI platforms.[1][3] Speculative AI estimates inadmissible.[1] Key factors: quantify harm pre/post, expert testimony needed, platforms often immune.[3] Compile 2-3 years financials, client loss affidavits, economic expert report.[1] Realistic valuation key to settlement.
